title: Lore Accurate Craftable Totem of Undying
description: As the title suggests this mod allows you to craft a totem of undying. Now with proper lore accuracy.
body:
This mod allows the player to craft totems of undying on their own without needing to hunt down those pesky illagers. Whilst most craftable totem mods would require the player to have to obtain an endgame item to craft one this one substitutes that requirement with a seemingly hilariously easy to obtain yet lore accurate item. That item being lapis lazuli specifically a block of lapis lazuli along with 4 blocks of gold and 2 blocks of emeralds. You see the difficulty for crafting the totem in this mod isn't the fact that you have to kill a boss for it but the fact that you have to spend a lot of time in the mines gathering the materials to craft it which is why I feel that this mod is "perfectly balanced."


TL;DR very simple to get(potentially tedious)
Recipe: 4x Gold Block, 2x Emerald Block, 1x Lapis Lazuli Block.
Crafting goes: Emerald top left, Gold top middle, Emerald top right, Gold middle left, Lapis middle middle, Gold middle right, Empty bottom left, Gold bottom middle, Empty bottom right.
